voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.

1.selected_form: Short Socratic dialogue with first-person Socratic narration (the *Republic* / *Charmides* frame).
1.stance: Patient, sober, ironic-warm; refusing the pre-set either/or the speakers brought.
